chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-624 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 10-10-2024 Mr. Mir Zamir Hussain Talpur, Advocate along with petitioner. Ms. Shabiran Lashari, Advocate for respondents a/w Zahid Khoso, Accounts Clerk, Town Committee, Kotdiji. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G. ***** Counsel for respondents has brought two cheques of remaining pensionery benefits amounting to Rs.3,38,496/- dated 09.10l.2024 and Rs.5,93,646/-09.11.2024 in the name of petitioner, which are handed out to her under acknowledgment. She states that entire amount of pensionery benefits has been paid to the petitioner. Counsel for petitioner being satisfied does not press this petition. Accordingly, this petition having served its purpose stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
